channel.title: Peace on The Everything Journal
channel.description: Recent content in Peace on The Everything Journal

item.title: Small Joys I Almost Missed This Week
item.description:
Small Joys I Almost Missed This Week

— collecting overlooked moments

The Almost-Missed Moments

A smile from a close friend, the breeze during commuting, the warmth of the sun when it’s almost dusk, and the soft pastel skies my heart and eyes can see.

There are all but moments of fleeting pleasures. I often take them for granted. I don’t think they’re appreciated as much as they should have been.

item.title: The Art of Doing Nothing for a While
item.description:
Sitting without filling the silence

The Urge to Fill the Silence

We have trained our minds to be busy. Our world surrounds us with applause when we hustle and grind, saying idle hands are for the weak and lazy. To have work to do is noble, especially if the motivation is to purposefully create a life you want with your own hands. Cautionary tales against idleness have their uses, undeniably.
